channel.title: SSpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump Calls for Jimmy Kimmel's Termination Over Melania Remark
item.description: President Trump publicly demanded the dismissal of late-night host Jimmy Kimmel after Kimmel made a comment referencing first lady Melania Trump.

item.title: Progressive Senators Push to Ban Super PAC Money in Democratic Primaries
item.description: Sen. Bernie Sanders is leading a group of the Senate's most liberal members in urging Democratic leadership to prohibit super PAC involvement in party primary elections.

item.title: Man Accused in Correspondents' Dinner Shooting Faces Assassination Charges
item.description: Federal prosecutors charged a California man with attempted assassination of the president following a shooting at the White House Correspondents' dinner.

item.title: Border Medical Contractors Defrauded DHS of Millions in False Travel Claims
item.description: Contractors providing healthcare to migrants at the border submitted fabricated travel expenses, defrauding the Department of Homeland Security of more than $1 million.
